landing.hero_desc: Experience luxury without limits. Our AI Virtual Try-On brings the boutique experience directly to you.
landing.step1_desc: Upload a clear, full-body photo of yourself to get started.
landing.step2_desc: Browse our exclusive collection of high-end boutique pieces.
landing.step3_desc: Our AI instantly generates a realistic preview of you in the outfit.
